description_long: This is a pair of modern, angular sunglasses featuring a bold, rectangular frame with a full-rim design. The frame is predominantly black with striking gold accents along the temples and bridge, giving it a contemporary and stylish appearance. The lenses are large, slightly oversized, and tinted dark gray, providing ample coverage and a sleek, urban look. The temples are straight and moderately thick, with gold detailing that adds a touch of sophistication. The bridge is solid and straight, with a gold bar that visually connects the two lenses. No visible brand logo or insignia is present on the frame or lenses.
description: A pair of rectangular, black sunglasses with gold accents and dark tinted lenses, featuring a bold, modern design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the thick, straight temples with gold detailing and the angular frame profile.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the large, rectangular dark lenses and the gold-accented bridge.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring the gold and black temple design and the frame's angular structure.
description_view_3: Angled front view emphasizing the full-rim frame, gold bridge, and the overall bold style.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, full-rim frame with bold, straight lines and moderate thickness; features a solid, straight bridge and straight temples with geometric styling.
attribute_lens_tint: Dark gray tint with high opacity, providing a uniform, non-gradient coverage; no mirrored or special effects visible.
attribute_bridge_style: Solid, straight bridge with a prominent gold bar spanning the top, connecting the two lenses seamlessly.
attribute_temple_detailing: Temples are straight and moderately thick, featuring gold accent bands near the hinges and a smooth, unembellished finish.
